title: Fix a group_by/select mismatch for post counts per category
prompt: `MyApp.Blog.Stats.post_count_by_category/0` in `test_fixtures/group_by_select_mismatch.ex` joins posts with categories, groups by `c.id`, and selects `{c.id, c.name, count(p.id)}`. Ecto raises at compile time because `c.name` is neither grouped nor aggregated. Fix the grouping so the select list is valid. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/blog/stats.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step: add `c.name` to the group_by list. Rule is well-documented in Ecto docs, pattern is mechanical once the error is recognized.
research_citation: Ecto.Query hexdocs: 'only fields that were referenced in the group_by can be used in the select or if the field is given as an argument to an aggregate function'
